ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "target_age_groups" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of age groups targeted by the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is mandatory */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight assigned to the question */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Additional instructions for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the response */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was submitted */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to answer the question (in seconds) */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the respondent (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the option is the correct answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_options" (
  "response_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response option */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the option is associated with */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected option */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the respondent (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES question_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the survey access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_access_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the question */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the question access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_access_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., category, topic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_tags_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., category, topic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the survey */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_versions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the question */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_versions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity affected (e.g., survey, question, response) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity affected */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the action */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the action (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity the feedback is for (e.g., survey, question) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the feedback (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or connection details of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the sync (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_sources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
